title: Onboarding Playbook
values: Introduce the mission, values, and your direct manager before any tools are opened.
Walk through laptop provisioning, VPN, and email configuration using the IT checklist.
Read the handbook sections on PTO, code of conduct, and expense policies.
Book 15-minute intros with each direct teammate within the first three days.
Attend the team's daily standup and introduce yourself in one sentence.
Submit the access request form for Figma, GitHub, Notion, and the staging environment.
Finish the mandatory security awareness module and forward the certificate to HR.
Watch the product demo recording and take notes on three things that surprised you.
Clone the monorepo, run the local setup, and read the top-level README.
Browse the Figma design system and match five components to their code equivalents.
Watch two recorded customer interviews and identify the top friction point each user mentions.
Join a live or recorded support session and note the most common question.
Learn where the numbers come from
Sit with the data analyst and trace one key metric from raw event to dashboard.
Read the current-quarter OKRs and write one sentence on how your role contributes to each.
Meet with your manager to review first impressions, clarify expectations, and surface any blockers.
